Mossy grotto behind cascading waterfall, ferns dripping moisture, still emerald pool reflecting scattered sunlight below.
Forest stream flowing over smooth river stones, dappled light dancing through overhanging willow branches above.
Natural hot spring in oak clearing, steam spiraling upward into crisp autumn air, minerals staining rocks.
Ancient stone well in forest clearing, moss-covered walls, water perfectly clear and cold far below.
Waterfall cascading down stepped limestone rocks, each level forming shallow pools edged with maiden ferns.
Rain-swollen creek rushing through narrow ravine, wild torrents churning between moss-slicked boulders and roots.
Cenote sinkhole in limestone bedrock, crystal-clear turquoise water revealing white sand bottom twenty feet down.
Beaver dam pond, mirror-still surface reflecting dense canopy, lily pads floating among submerged branches.
Sacred spring where crystalline water bubbles eternally from deep underground through white sand and pebbles.
Bog pool with dark peaty water, sphagnum moss cushions, carnivorous sundew plants glistening on hummocks.
Mountain stream at headwaters, snowmelt trickling from beneath retreating glacier over bare granite scree.
Forest lake at dawn, thick mist hovering motionless on glassy surface like layers of cotton.
Hidden waterfall plunging into deep grotto pool, curtain of water creating perpetual rainbow in spray.
Shallow spring-fed brook meandering through carpet of watercress and forget-me-nots in dappled shade.
Oxbow lake cut off from main river, perfectly still water choked with water lilies and dragonflies.
Rocky cascade tumbling through rhododendron thicket, water white with foam over dark volcanic stones below.
Vernal pool in beech forest hollow, temporary water reflecting spring sky, salamander eggs suspended within.
Cold seep emerging from cliff face, creating perpetual drip over hanging moss and delicate maidenhair ferns.
Flooded cypress grove, tree trunks rising from tea-colored water, roots creating natural archways beneath surface.
Mountain tarn nestled in cirque basin, fed by summer snowmelt, surrounded by alpine wildflowers and lichens.
Narrow slot canyon stream, water flowing through polished sandstone corridor barely wider than shoulders.
Spring-fed lagoon with sandy bottom, water so clear it seems invisible, surrounded by weeping birches.
Fast-flowing creek braiding around gravel bars, cottonwood trees trailing branches in current along eroded banks.
Limestone sink where surface stream vanishes underground through smooth circular opening into darkness below.
Tidal freshwater marsh where river meets forest, reeds swaying with gentle current, herons stalking shallows.
